description_long: This is a modern lounge chair featuring a dark upholstered seat and backrest, supported by a wooden frame with angular armrests and legs. A checkered throw blanket is draped over one armrest and partially across the seat, adding a touch of comfort and visual interest. A single square cushion with a subtle grid pattern rests against the backrest, providing additional support. The chair's frame is constructed from medium-toned wood, with visible grain and a sturdy, geometric design. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven fabric, giving the chair a semi-soft yet supportive feel. The overall aesthetic is contemporary and inviting, suitable for stylish urban interiors or semi-public spaces.
description: A modern lounge chair with dark fabric upholstery, wooden frame, a checkered throw blanket, and a grid-patterned cushion. The design is angular, comfortable, and visually appealing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular wooden armrest and leg, with the throw blanket draped over the backrest and seat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the seat, cushion, and the throw blanket spread across the right armrest and seat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the throw blanket more prominently displayed, cascading down the armrest and side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain backrest and the wooden frame, with the throw blanket visible on one side.
